doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document misstates Illinois law—a 5-day notice gives tenants the right to cure by paying and requires a court eviction process before vacating—and no such joint HUD/Illinois AG fact sheet exists.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document grossly misstates Illinois law (a 5-day notice gives tenants the right to cure by paying, and landlords must file an eviction suit and obtain a court order before tenants are required to vacate), and no such joint HUD/Illinois AG fact sheet exists.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document misstates Illinois law—a 5-day notice gives tenants the right to cure by paying and requires a court eviction process before vacating—and no such joint HUD/Illinois AG fact sheet exists.
